sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ شَادِيٌّ مَهَارَةً جَدِيدَةً فِي الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Šadi je naučio novu vještinu na poslu.
sentences.translationEn: Shadi learned a new skill at work.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذَ دَوْرَةً تَدْرِيبِيَّةً قَصِيرَةً عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Pohađao je kratki trening kurs putem interneta.
sentences.translationEn: He took a short training course via the internet.

sentences.arabic: طَبَّقَ مَا تَعَلَّمَهُ فِي عَمَلِهِ الْيَوْمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Primijenio je ono što je naučio u svakodnevnom radu.
sentences.translationEn: He applied what he learned in his daily work.

sentences.translation: Direktor je primijetio poboljšanje i pohvalio ga.
sentences.translationEn: The manager noticed the improvement and praised him.
